summary: Tested UAN/ESI employee fields (edit + view) and Payslip PDF download feature end-to-end. Backend: 12/12 tests pass for new features. Frontend: all 8 specified test points verified via Playwright - UAN/ESI in employee edit modal (Statutory Numbers section), UAN/ESI in employee detail view, PDF row button triggers download, payslip modal opens with all sections, modal Download PDF button works.
critical_code_review_comments: payroll.py process_payroll: if present_days==0, defaults to full working_days=26. This causes RMF0003 payslip to show Payable Days=1 (only 1 attendance punch found) but Gross shows ₹18,000. Actual net is ₹617.89 — this is low-value test data, not a bug, but worth noting.

payslip_pdf.py: ROUNDEDCORNERS is not a standard ReportLab TableStyle command. It will be silently ignored. No impact on output since the net salary box renders without rounded corners via Table background color.

EmployeeEditForm.js: UAN/ESI fields use the generic F() helper which does NOT render with <select> or <textarea> — correct for these numeric string fields, and data-testid='edit-uan_number' / 'edit-esi_number' are properly applied via the data-testid={`edit-${key}`} pattern.
seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_UAN ESI employees (RMF0045, RMF0046) during testing with uan_number=102108000001 then updated to 102108999999.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file for UAN/ESI + payslip PDF is at /app/backend/tests/test_uan_esi_payslip.py (12 tests). RMF0003 has uan_number=102108206145 and esi_number=3013878059. Payroll record 69f1e022c2a475886373f6b6 is the RMF0003 Apr-2026 record used for PDF testing. All previous test suites (test_hr_api.py, test_new_features.py, test_kyc_ocr.py) still pass.
verified_test_points: ✓ Employee edit modal 'Statutory Numbers' section has UAN Number and ESI Number fields
✓ Employee edit form pre-populates saved UAN/ESI values
✓ Employee detail (View tab) shows UAN Number and ESI Number
✓ UAN/ESI values (102108206145 / 3013878059) visible in View tab for RMF0003
✓ Payroll page has both Eye (view) and FileText (PDF) buttons per row (11+11 for 11 records)
✓ Payslip modal shows employee info, earnings, deductions, net salary, Download PDF button
✓ PDF download row button triggers blob: download (Payslip_TEST_Track_Field_2026-04.pdf)
✓ Modal Download PDF button also triggers blob: download
✓ PDF starts with %PDF magic bytes (valid PDF)
